creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #21)

> I believe the way out is to rip off the band aid that the legacy
> implementation of WoW64 on FreeBSD is and move to what upstream
> has been working on for the last two years.

Does new WoW64 actually work on Linux? It's still labeled as
experimental, after all.
